headline: Which S&P500 stocks are gapping on Tuesday?
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's session regarding gap up and gap down stocks? Explore the S&P500 index on Tuesday to uncover the stocks that are gapping in the S&P500 index.

headline: Earnings Preview: NVR (NVR) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: NVR (NVR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
